prestazioni: Lingenfelter L87 6.2L LT4 Supercharged crate engine swap (engine code LT4, 800+ HP with forged internals, ported cylinder heads, and custom camshaft profile by Brian Tooley Racing)
Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilover suspension with ZR2-specific valving, 2.5-inch remote reservoirs, and adjustable compression/rebound damping for off-road precision

Holley Dominator EFI engine management system with custom calibration for LT4, paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (106mm inducer, 88mm exducer) and a Tial MV-R 64mm wastegate for boost control
estetica: Rough Country ZR2-specific 6-inch suspension lift kit with heavy-duty control arms and differential skid plate for aggressive stance and 37-inch Nitto Ridge Grappler tires
Rally Innovations ZR2 front bumper with integrated Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods and a custom fabricated rear bumper with swing-out tire carrier and RotopaX fuel/water can mounts

Hoodcraft USA carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractor vents, paired with a custom bed cage by Fab Fours and a set of Method MR701 wheels in Satin Black (17x9, +18 offset) for a tactical overland aesthetic
